Committed cleanly. The plan is fully implemented and verified. ``` [RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE ``` ## Summary **Implemented** (all 3 phases of the plan): - **`index.html`** — semantic HTML5 landing page: `lang="en"`, viewport meta, `Hula — Coming Soon`, `

Welcome to Hula

`, and an `
` with an under-construction `
` (🚧 icon `aria-hidden`, "Under Construction" heading, explanatory message + the required HTML comment). - **`styles.css`** — CSS reset, centered flex layout, amber under-construction banner, responsive `rem`-based sizing. - **`.github/workflows/pages.yml`** — standard `actions/deploy-pages` workflow deploying the repo root to GitHub Pages on push to `main`. **Verification:** - No build/lint/type-check tooling exists in this greenfield repo (no `package.json`/`tsconfig`), so verification was grep-based AC checks + parser validation. - HTML parsed clean via `html.parser`; all required tags present. - Acceptance criteria **AC1–AC7 all pass**: title, `

`, 🚧 + heading + message, viewport, no `
